age_mem_text.text: ระยะเวลาการเป็นสมาชิก

mem_type.text: สถานะของสมาชิก

age_life_text.text: อายุของสมาชิก

sex.text: เพศของสมาชิก

period_recrieve.text: งวดหุ้นสมาชิก

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control )as member_group_control, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth, pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card)as id_card, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, 1 ) as address_line1, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, 2 ) as address_line2, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, 3 ) as address_line3, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,('0')::text, 4 ) as address_line4
,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)) as age_mem_text /*อายุการเป็นสมาชิก*/ ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as age_life_text /*อายุ*/
,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.period_recrieve
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_member_work_info, sc_mem_m_share_mem WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' ) and substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)),0,2) between '!age_mem_text_1!' and '!age_mem_text_2!' and substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),0,2) between '!age_life_text_1!' and '!age_life_text_2!' /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '000019' --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex = 'F' --and sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount between '' and '' ORDER BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ASC, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ASC, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
